resources.string: The remote data source is not configured.
The server returned an empty list, so the local database was kept.
The server record count was inconsistent. Expected: %1$d, downloaded: %2$d.
The server returned %1$d row(s) with a blank additive code.
The server returned duplicate additive code(s): %1$s.
An unexpected remote database synchronization error occurred.
An unexpected remote database synchronization error occurred. Details: %1$s
